overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a female warrior character running through a dark forest environment at night. The scene features a distinctive teal-green moonlight aesthetic contrasted with warm orange torchlight from stone lamp posts. The character traverses rocky terrain and dense woodland, approaching a large rock formation in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest clearing with scattered trees

events.description: character approaches and passes the first torch post marking the forest entrance

agents.ego_description: running steadily through rocky terrain toward the forest, navigating uneven ground

entered.detail: uneven rocky ground with patches of grass and small stones covering the path
scattered trees with thin trunks on the left side of the clearing
tall stone pillar with burning flame on top providing warm orange light
dense dark tree line marking the edge of the clearing ahead

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a rocky clearing at night, approaching the edge of a forest. Sparse trees dot the landscape while a torch post becomes visible ahead, marking the path into the denser woodland. The ground is uneven with rocks and patches of grass.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest path lined with torch posts

events.description: passing between two torch posts, creating a frame of warm light against the cool moonlight

agents.ego_description: running along a forest path, passing multiple torch posts that line the route through dense trees

entered.detail: thick cluster of trees with dense canopy blocking parts of the night sky
stone torch pillar on the right side of the path matching the left one
prominent thick-trunked tree with spreading branches overhanging the path

segments.scene_description: The character enters a denser forest section where the path is lined with multiple torch posts. Large trees flank both sides with thick undergrowth visible. The lighting shifts as the character passes between torches, creating alternating warm and cool areas on the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open clearing approaching large rock monolith

events.description: forest opens into a wide clearing revealing a large rock formation ahead

agents.ego_description: running toward a large rock formation that dominates the center of the clearing ahead

entered.detail: tall monolithic rock structure standing prominently in the clearing ahead
small wooden building or hut partially visible among trees on the left side
open grassy ground replacing the rocky forest floor

segments.scene_description: The forest opens into a wide clearing where a massive rock formation becomes the focal point ahead. The ground transitions to grassy terrain, and a wooden structure appears on the left. The character continues running toward the monolithic rock as the path widens and more torch lights become visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a warrior traverses a rocky nocturnal landscape that transitions from a sparse woodland edge into a dense forest and finally opens into a wide clearing. It begins in a rocky clearing with sparse trees, moving forward as a single torch post emerges to mark the entrance to the woods. As the character enters the denser forest, the environment shifts into a corridor of thick undergrowth and towering trees, where the lighting alternates between cool moonlight and the warm glow of a line of torch posts. The scene then expands as the forest thins, transitioning the terrain from wooded paths to open grassy ground with a wooden structure appearing to the left. Finally, the path widens toward a distant array of torch lights, centering on a massive, monolithic rock formation that dominates the horizon.
